arts.ttl: Scott Parker sends message to Burnley fans pining for Vincent Kompany glory days
arts.sum: Some Burnley fans are muttering because Burnley have won only won two of their last seven league campaigns and are pining for two years ago when they walked the Championship under Vincent Kompany

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'identify' Alphonso Davies alternative transfer target
arts.sum: Real Madrid have identified an alternative transfer target to Bayern Munich left-back Alphonso Davies.
Action from the German top flight returns after the international break and Alex Jack is on hand to provide score predictions for all nine Bundesliga games this weekend.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich coach, exec rave over improved play from Kim Min-jae
arts.sum: Bayern Munich center-back Kim Min-jae has been experiencing a resurgence after a tough second half of the season during the 2023/24 campaign. Bayern Munich board member for sport Max Eberl has also seen an uptick in performance from Min-jae and his defensive partner, Dayot Upamecano.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Augsburg Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will look to maintain their unbeaten start to the season when they face off against Augsburg in the Bundesliga tonight. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game...

arts.ttl: Predicted Bayern Munich XI vs Augsburg
arts.sum: The Bundesliga returns after the international break with the opening game of the match day being a duel in Bavaria as Bayern Munich host Augsburg. The biggest doubt heading into…

arts.ttl: Hoeness promises Bayern will win the Bundesliga after strong start to season
arts.sum: Just 10 games into the Bundesliga season, Uli Hoeness has promised that Bayern Munich will win the title.

arts.ttl: Former Bayern Munich prospect eager to take the pitch with FC Augsburg against his old club
arts.sum: In an interview with Abendzeitung journalist Kilian Kreitmair (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), former Bayern Munich prospect and current FC Augsburg attacker Yusuf Kabadayı said that he was eager to face his former club. We want to play a good game.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: PSG could be player for Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich and Sporting CP’s Viktor Gyökeres; Liverpool taking close look at Real Madrid star?; Erling Haaland getting new deal from Manchester City?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain could still be a major player for Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich despite the presence of the Bavarians, Real Madrid, FC Barcelona, and maybe even clubs like Manchester City and Manchester United into the bidding circle: Paris Saint-Germain have shown strong interest in Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich in recent months, with reports from Germany revealing that a move almost happened this past summer.

arts.ttl: Max Eberl reveals Bayern Munich’s winter plans
arts.sum: Bayern Munich executive Max EBerl confirmed a rumor that had been floating around for quite a while —- the team will not be traveling for its winter training camp. One of the benefits of Bayern Munich’s reduced travel plans could be more time for the front office to work on contract extensions for several key players.
